mapper.sql: ( m.exec_dept_id is not null and trim(m.exec_dept_id) != '' and trim(dscope.his_id) = trim(m.exec_dept_id) ) or ( ( m.exec_dept_id is null or trim(m.exec_dept_id) = '' or not exists ( select 1 from fd_department dmap where (dmap.del_flag = 0 or dmap.del_flag is null) and dmap.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and trim(dmap.his_id) = trim(m.exec_dept_id) ) ) and ( (m.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and m.dept_code is not null and trim(m.dept_code) != '' and trim(dscope.his_id) = trim(m.dept_code)) or (m.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and m.clinic_code is not null and trim(m.clinic_code) != '' and trim(dscope.his_id) = trim(m.clinic_code)) ) )

left join ( select distinct fm.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) as charge_item_id from fd_material fm where fm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) and trim(fm.is_gz) = '1' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' ) fm_high on fm_high.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and fm_high.charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id)
case when fm_high.charge_item_id is not null then '1' else '2' end

m.id, m.tenant_id, m.visit_kind, m.fetch_batch_id, m.his_inpatient_charge_id, m.his_outpatient_charge_id, m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, m.his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, m.patient_id, m.patient_name, m.patient_sex, m.inpatient_no, m.outpatient_no, m.dept_code, m.dept_name, m.clinic_code, m.clinic_name, m.exec_dept_id, m.exec_dept_name, m.doctor_id, m.doctor_name, m.charge_item_id, m.item_name, m.spec_model, m.batch_no, m.expire_date, m.use_date, m.charge_date_display, m.charge_at, m.quantity, m.unit_price, m.total_amount, m.charge_operator, m.payment_type, m.receipt_no, m.remark, m.row_fingerprint, m.process_status, m.process_type, m.process_time, m.process_by, m.process_party, m.process_situation, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time

where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and m.visit_kind = #{visitKind}
and ( m.patient_name like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') or ifnull(m.patient_name_referred, '') like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') )
and lower(ifnull(m.inpatient_no, '')) like concat('%', lower(#{inpatientNo}), '%')
and lower(ifnull(m.outpatient_no, '')) like concat('%', lower(#{outpatientNo}), '%')
and ( lower(ifnull(m.inpatient_no, '')) like concat('%', lower(#{visitNo}), '%') or lower(ifnull(m.outpatient_no, '')) like concat('%', lower(#{visitNo}), '%') )
and trim(m.charge_item_id) = #{chargeItemId}
and ( m.charge_item_id like concat('%', #{chargeItemId}, '%') or m.item_name like concat('%', #{chargeItemId}, '%') or exists ( select 1 from his_charge_item_mirror cim_kw where cim_kw.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and trim(cim_kw.charge_item_id) = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim_kw.deleted_flag is null or cim_kw.deleted_flag != 1) and ( cim_kw.charge_item_id like concat('%', #{chargeItemId}, '%') or ifnull(cim_kw.item_code, '') like concat('%', #{chargeItemId}, '%') or cim_kw.item_name like concat('%', #{chargeItemId}, '%') or ifnull(cim_kw.referred_code, '') like concat('%', #{chargeItemId}, '%') ) ) )
and m.his_inpatient_charge_id like concat('%', #{hisChargeId}, '%')
and m.his_outpatient_charge_id like concat('%', #{hisChargeId}, '%')
and ( (m.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and m.his_inpatient_charge_id like concat('%', #{hisChargeId}, '%')) or (m.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and m.his_outpatient_charge_id like concat('%', #{hisChargeId}, '%')) )
and trim(ifnull(m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf,'')) = trim(#{chargeIdTf})
and trim(ifnull(m.his_outpatient_charge_id_tf,'')) = trim(#{chargeIdTf})
and ( (m.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and trim(ifnull(m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf,'')) = trim(#{chargeIdTf})) or (m.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and trim(ifnull(m.his_outpatient_charge_id_tf,'')) = trim(#{chargeIdTf})) )
and exists ( select 1 from fd_department dsel where (dsel.del_flag = 0 or dsel.del_flag is null) and dsel.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and dsel.id = #{departmentId} and ( (m.exec_dept_id is not null and trim(m.exec_dept_id) != '' and trim(dsel.his_id) = trim(m.exec_dept_id)) or ( (m.exec_dept_id is null or trim(m.exec_dept_id) = '') and ( (m.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and m.dept_code is not null and trim(m.dept_code) != '' and trim(dsel.his_id) = trim(m.dept_code)) or (m.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and m.clinic_code is not null and trim(m.clinic_code) != '' and trim(dsel.his_id) = trim(m.clinic_code)) ) ) ) )
and exists ( select 1 from fd_department od where (od.del_flag = 0 or od.del_flag is null) and od.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and od.id = #{orderingDepartmentId} and ( (m.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and trim(od.his_id) = trim(m.dept_code)) or (m.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and trim(od.his_id) = trim(m.clinic_code)) ) )
and m.process_status != 'PENDING_CONSUME'
and m.process_status = 'PENDING_CONSUME'
and m.charge_at >= #{beginChargeDate} and m.charge_at <= #{endChargeDate} and m.process_time >= #{beginProcessTime} and m.process_time <= #{endProcessTime} and fm_high.charge_item_id is not null and fm_high.charge_item_id is null
and fm_high.charge_item_id is not null and fm_high.charge_item_id is null
and () in #{vl}
and m.dept_name like concat('%', #{deptNameLike}, '%')
and m.clinic_name like concat('%', #{clinicNameLike}, '%')
and (m.dept_name like concat('%', #{deptNameLike}, '%') or m.clinic_name like concat('%', #{deptNameLike}, '%'))
and m.exec_dept_name like concat('%', #{execDeptNameLike}, '%')
and m.item_name like concat('%', #{itemNameLike}, '%')
mapper.select: select count(*) from his_patient_charge_mirror_unified where tenant_id = #{tenantId}
select ifnull((select count(*) from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId}), 0) + ifnull((select count(*) from his_outpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId}), 0)
mapper.insert: insert into his_patient_charge_mirror_unified ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_outpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, patient_name_referred, inpatient_no, outpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, clinic_code, clinic_name, exec_dept_id, exec_dept_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date_display, charge_at, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, payment_type, receipt_no, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, process_type, process_time, process_by, value_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) select m.id, m.tenant_id, 'INPATIENT', m.fetch_batch_id, m.his_inpatient_charge_id, null, m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, null, m.patient_id, m.patient_name, null, m.inpatient_no, null, m.dept_code, m.dept_name, null, null, m.exec_dept_id, m.exec_dept_name, m.doctor_id, m.doctor_name, trim(m.charge_item_id), m.item_name, m.spec_model, m.batch_no, m.expire_date, case when m.use_date is null or trim(ifnull(m.use_date,'')) = '' then null else str_to_date(left(trim(m.use_date), 19), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') end, left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 64), coalesce( str_to_date(left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 19), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), str_to_date(concat(left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 10), ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), cast(m.charge_date as datetime) ), m.quantity, m.unit_price, m.total_amount, m.charge_operator, null, null, m.remark, m.row_fingerprint, m.process_status, m.process_type, m.process_time, m.process_by, ifnull(cim.value_level, '2'), m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time from his_inpatient_charge_mirror m left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and cim.charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and not exists (select 1 from his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u where u.id = m.id)

insert into his_patient_charge_mirror_unified ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_outpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, patient_name_referred, inpatient_no, outpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, clinic_code, clinic_name, exec_dept_id, exec_dept_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date_display, charge_at, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, payment_type, receipt_no, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, process_type, process_time, process_by, value_level, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) select m.id, m.tenant_id, 'OUTPATIENT', m.fetch_batch_id, null, m.his_outpatient_charge_id, null, m.his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, m.patient_id, m.patient_name, null, null, m.outpatient_no, null, null, m.clinic_code, m.clinic_name, m.exec_dept_id, m.exec_dept_name, m.doctor_id, m.doctor_name, trim(m.charge_item_id), m.item_name, m.spec_model, m.batch_no, m.expire_date, null, left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 64), coalesce( str_to_date(left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 19), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), str_to_date(concat(left(replace(trim(ifnull(cast(m.charge_date as char), '')), '/', '-'), 10), ' 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ), m.quantity, m.unit_price, m.total_amount, m.charge_operator, m.payment_type, m.receipt_no, m.remark, m.row_fingerprint, m.process_status, m.process_type, m.process_time, m.process_by, ifnull(cim.value_level, '2'), m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time from his_outpatient_charge_mirror m left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and cim.charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and not exists (select 1 from his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u where u.id = m.id)

insert into his_patient_charge_mirror_unified ( id, tenant_id, visit_kind, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_outpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, his_outpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, patient_name_referred, inpatient_no, outpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, clinic_code, clinic_name, exec_dept_id, exec_dept_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date_display, charge_at, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, payment_type, receipt_no, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, process_type, process_time, process_by, value_level, create_by, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.visitKind}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisOutpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.hisOutpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.patientId}, #{e.patientName}, #{e.patientNameReferred}, #{e.inpatientNo}, #{e.outpatientNo}, #{e.deptCode}, #{e.deptName}, #{e.clinicCode}, #{e.clinicName}, #{e.execDeptId}, #{e.execDeptName}, #{e.doctorId}, #{e.doctorName}, #{e.chargeItemId}, #{e.itemName}, #{e.specModel}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.expireDate}, #{e.useDate}, #{e.chargeDateDisplay}, #{e.chargeAt}, #{e.quantity}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.totalAmount}, #{e.chargeOperator}, #{e.paymentType}, #{e.receiptNo}, #{e.remark}, #{e.rowFingerprint}, #{e.processStatus}, #{e.processType}, #{e.processTime}, #{e.processBy}, #{e.valueLevel}, #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime})
mapper.update: update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set process_status = #{processStatus}, process_type = #{processType}, process_time = #{processTime}, process_by = #{processBy}, process_situation = #{processSituation}, process_party = #{processParty}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{rid}

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set process_situation = #{processSituation}, process_party = #{processParty}, process_time = #{processTime}, process_by = #{processBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{rid}

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set exec_dept_id = #{execDeptId}, exec_dept_name = #{execDeptName}, row_fingerprint = #{rowFingerprint}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and his_inpatient_charge_id = #{hisChargeId} and (exec_dept_id is null or trim(exec_dept_id) = '') and #{execDeptId} is not null and trim(#{execDeptId}) != ''

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set exec_dept_id = #{execDeptId}, exec_dept_name = #{execDeptName}, row_fingerprint = #{rowFingerprint}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and his_outpatient_charge_id = #{hisChargeId} and (exec_dept_id is null or trim(exec_dept_id) = '') and #{execDeptId} is not null and trim(#{execDeptId}) != ''

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u inner join his_inpatient_charge_mirror m on u.id = m.id and u.tenant_id = m.tenant_id set u.exec_dept_id = m.exec_dept_id, u.exec_dept_name = m.exec_dept_name, u.row_fingerprint = m.row_fingerprint, u.update_time = now() where u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and u.visit_kind = 'INPATIENT' and (u.exec_dept_id is null or trim(u.exec_dept_id) = '') and m.exec_dept_id is not null and trim(m.exec_dept_id) != ''

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u inner join his_outpatient_charge_mirror m on u.id = m.id and u.tenant_id = m.tenant_id set u.exec_dept_id = m.exec_dept_id, u.exec_dept_name = m.exec_dept_name, u.row_fingerprint = m.row_fingerprint, u.update_time = now() where u.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and u.visit_kind = 'OUTPATIENT' and (u.exec_dept_id is null or trim(u.exec_dept_id) = '') and m.exec_dept_id is not null and trim(m.exec_dept_id) != ''

choose.when: order by coalesce(nullif(trim(m.inpatient_no), ''), nullif(trim(m.outpatient_no), '')) ${sortOrder == 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}, m.id desc
choose.otherwise: order by m.charge_at desc, m.id desc

mapper.update: update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified set value_level = #{valueLevel}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and trim(charge_item_id) = trim(#{chargeItemId})

update his_patient_charge_mirror_unified u left join ( select distinct fm.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) as charge_item_id from fd_material fm where fm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) and trim(fm.is_gz) = '1' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' ) hf on hf.tenant_id = u.tenant_id and hf.charge_item_id = trim(u.charge_item_id) left join ( select distinct cim.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(cim.charge_item_id) as charge_item_id from his_charge_item_mirror cim where cim.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag != 1) and cim.value_level = '1' and cim.charge_item_id is not null and trim(cim.charge_item_id) != '' ) hcf on hcf.tenant_id = u.tenant_id and hcf.charge_item_id = trim(u.charge_item_id) set u.value_level = case when hf.charge_item_id is not null or hcf.charge_item_id is not null then '1' else '2' end, u.update_time = now() where u.tenant_id = #{tenantId}
